ab: nyan psba biru la.
en: The teacher is here.

ab: iya gno la, nahay tama tman.
ch: B:不要再玩了，快坐在座位上。
en: Stop playing and quickly sit in your seat.

ab: swali caku, nyu caku msu’i la.
en: Sorry, I’m late!

ab: nahay uwah miyuk.
en: Come in quickly.

ab: te pisa ryax hngawan soni?
en: What day is it today?

ab: te magan ryax hngawan soni, mhngi cuxan, hata ms’un mtisan.
ch: B:今天星期五，明天放假，一起出去玩吧。
en: It’s Friday today, we have a day off tomorrow. Let’s go out and play together!

ab: aw ga ! hata beh llyung.
en: Great! Let’s go to the riverside.

ab: te pisa ryax hngawan cuxan iya?
en: What day will it be tomorrow?

ab: te tugan ryax hngawan cuxan, hata mahi boru cuxan ’lyan ga.
ch: B:明天星期三，我們明天下午去打球吧。
en: Tomorrow will be Wednesday. Let’s go play ball tomorrow afternoon!

ab: ungat lalu yaw su cuxan sasan?
ch: A:你明天早上沒有什麼事?
en: What will you be doing tomorrow morning?

ab: cuxan ga ryax hngawan, pgluw cu yaya mu mosa Kyokay.
ch: B:明天是星期日，我要和媽媽去教會。
en: Tomorrow will be Sunday, I will be going to church with my mom.

ab: cyu su mhcwa?
en: What’s wrong?

ab: pputa’ caku la, mosa caku bukan ha.
en: I feel like vomiting. I need to go to the restroom.

ab: tkging ci tunux mu.
en: I feel dizzy.

ab: hngi srapa’ kya ha.
en: Lie down and rest.

ab: psba biru, ga’ing ci nbwas mu, mosa caku bukan ha.
ch: A:老師，我肚子痛，要去廁所。
en: Teacher, I have a stomachache. I need to go to the restroom.

ab: aw, nahay usa.
en: Okay, go quickly.

ab: ana caku mosa mema ’ba?
en: May I go wash my hands?

ab: obeh mhngi m’wasan biru la, usa kisa.
en: It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.

ab: psba biru, ga’ing ci tunux mu, psina caku mhngi ’lyan.
ch: A:老師，我頭好痛，下午要請假。
en: It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.

ab: aw, pnba lungan mosa sali wah.
en: Okay, take care and go home.

ab: psba biru, mwah hngawan te utux ryax hani ga psina caku mhngi, mosa cu pkita pkhguk.
ch: A:老師，我下禮拜一要請假，我要去看醫生。
en: Teacher, I need to take a sick leave next Monday. I have to see a doctor.

ab: aw, ble mlahang he su.
en: Alright, take care of yourself.

ab: cyu inu Habaw?
en: Where is Habaw?

ab: cyu ga’ing nbwas nya, wayan bukan.
en: She has a stomachache. She’s in the restroom.

ab: cyu inu Yukan?
en: Where is Yukan?

ab: psba biru, cyu ga’ing olu Yukan, wan lama psina mhngi soni la.
ch: B:老師，Yukan喉嚨痛，今天先請假了。
en: Teacher, Yukan has a sore throat. She took a sick leave today.

ab: ca ini uwah Habaw nya?
en: Why didn’t Habaw come?

ab: cyu mkilux tunux nya.
en: She has a fever.
